message:
fix(providers): buffer orphan tool call argument deltas arriving before the added event

openai_responses.rs:
- Add orphan_tool_call_arguments HashMap to buffer argument deltas that
  arrive for tool calls whose "added" event hasn't been received yet
- On function_call_arguments.delta: if no matching tool call state
  exists, buffer the delta in orphan_tool_call_arguments instead of
  silently dropping it
- On output_item.added (function_call): drain any buffered orphan
  arguments and prepend them to the initial arguments, so the full
  argument string is preserved regardless of event ordering
- On output_item.done (synthesized start): use buffered orphan arguments
  when no tracked state exists, ensuring late-arriving tool calls still
  receive their accumulated argument deltas

Add test:
- test_stream_preserves_orphan_tool_call_deltas_until_done: verifies
  that argument deltas arriving before the added event are buffered
  and correctly included in the synthesized Start/Delta/End sequence

agent.rs:
- Reformat assert_eq! expressions in policy resolution tests per
  rustfmt style (no functional change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
